bio: We are the culmination of centuries of evolution, where wisdom and innovation converge. Our philosophy is rooted in the pursuit of universal beauty, as envisioned by Akira Akatsuki and Eita Emiya. We seek to harmonize tradition and progress, forging a new path forward.
name: New_Genesis_330_Reformed_333_Orthodox_335_Reformed_337_Orthodox_343_Reformed_348
